info.title: PayVessel API
info.description: PayVessel API for accepting payments, sending money, verifying identities, and managing wallets

get.description: Returns all plants from the system that the user has access to

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of results to return

post.description: Creates a new plant in the store

requestBody.description: Plant to add to the store

delete.description: Deletes a single plant based on the ID supplied

post.description: Verify a BVN against submitted identity details such as first name, middle name, last name, gender, date of birth, and phone number.

402.description: Verification could not be processed because the wallet balance is insufficient

value.message: Your wallet balance is insufficient for this request. Required 25.00, available 0. Please fund your wallet and try again.
details: Your wallet balance is insufficient for this request. Required 25.00, available 0. Please fund your wallet and try again.

post.description: Create a reserved virtual bank account for a customer. Each reserved account is unique per customer, supports static and dynamic modes, and triggers notifications when funded. Use static accounts for recurring funding and dynamic accounts for one-time payments.

bankcode: At least one partner bank code is required
bvn: BVN is mandatory for STATIC accounts

value.message: Unauthorized. Please check your API key.

get.description: Fetch details of a specific virtual account using its business ID and account number.

parameters.name: businessid
parameters.description: Merchant business ID associated with the virtual account

post.description: Process a card payment by charging the customer's card. This endpoint initiates the payment flow and may require additional authentication steps like OTP or PIN validation.

get.description: Check the final status of a card payment transaction. Use this to confirm whether a payment was successful after authentication steps.
Retrieve the public encryption key for securing sensitive card data during transmission.

post.description: Resend the one-time password (OTP) for card payment authentication when the initial OTP was not received or expired.

get.description: Resolve card Bank Identification Number (BIN) to get card type, bank information, and other card metadata.

parameters.name: bin
parameters.description: First 6-8 digits of the card number (Bank Identification Number)

get.description: Simulate a 3D Secure authentication callback for testing purposes in the sandbox environment.

post.description: Validate the one-time password (OTP) provided by the customer for card payment authentication.
Validate the customer's phone number for card payment authentication and OTP delivery.
Validate the customer's card PIN for payment authentication when required by the card issuer.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific transaction using its reference. This endpoint provides comprehensive transaction data including status, amounts, fees, and associated entities.

post.description: Initialize a new payment transaction with customer details, amount, and payment channels. This creates a transaction session that can be used for payment processing.

get.description: Verify the status of a payment transaction by reference

parameters.name: reference
parameters.description: The unique transaction reference returned when the payment was initialized

example.message: Unauthorized. Please check your API key

get.description: Retrieve list of supported banks for fund transfers

post.description: Resolve an account number to an account name before initiating transfer
Send money from your managed wallet to a bank account
Initiate multiple wallet transfers in a single batch
Check the status of a previously initiated transfer
Create a digital wallet for customers to store funds and make transactions

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Unique key to prevent duplicate wallet creation

get.description: List or retrieve managed wallets for your business
Retrieve the current balance for a managed wallet

parameters.name: wallet_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the wallet

get.description: Get transaction history for a managed wallet

post.description: Information about a new plant added to the store

200.description: Return a 200 status to indicate that the data was received successfully

charged.description: Whether the verification request was billed

charged_amount.description: Amount charged for the verification request

name_match_rlt.description: Result of the name match check

birthday_match_rlt.description: Result of the birthday match check

gender_match_rlt.description: Result of the gender match check

phone_number_match_rlt.description: Result of the phone number match check

name_match_rlt.description: Result of the name match check

birthday_match_rlt.description: Result of the birthday match check

gender_match_rlt.description: Result of the gender match check

phone_number_match_rlt.description: Result of the phone number match check

message.description: Reason the request could not be processed
message.example: Your wallet balance is insufficient for this request. Required 25.00, available 0. Please fund your wallet and try again.

details.description: Detailed error messages returned by the API
example: Your wallet balance is insufficient for this request. Required 25.00, available 0. Please fund your wallet and try again.

name_on_card.description: Name shown on the customer's card record

photo.description: Customer photo returned by the provider

phone_number.description: Primary phone number linked to the BVN

phone_number_2.description: Secondary phone number linked to the BVN

photo.description: Customer photo returned by the provider

telephone_no.description: Telephone number linked to the NIN

source_image.description: Source face image as a URL or base64 string

target_image.description: Target face image as a URL or base64 string

similarity.description: Similarity score returned by the comparison engine

verify_result.description: Whether the bank account verification succeeded

name.description: Customer full name (first name and last name)

phoneNumber.description: Customer phone number in international format

bankcode.description: List of partner bank codes to provision the virtual account with

account_type.description: Type of virtual account to create

businessid.description: Merchant business ID supplied by Payvessel

bvn.description: Customer Bank Verification Number (required for STATIC accounts)

nin.description: Customer National Identification Number (use when BVN is unavailable)

accountNumber.description: Account number assigned to the customer

trackingReference.description: Reference used to track transactions on this account

errors.description: Validation errors keyed by field name

bankCode.description: Partner bank code associated with the account

accountName.description: Account name assigned to the customer

expire_date.description: Expiration date for dynamic accounts; null for static accounts

trackingReference.description: Tracking reference for payments made to this account

cardData.description: Encrypted card data containing payment information

key.description: Encryption key for the card data

redirect_url.description: URL to redirect customer for authentication

gateway_response.description: Additional response data from payment gateway

transactionRef.description: Transaction reference to check status for
Transaction reference to resend OTP for

sub_brand.description: Card sub-brand or specific product type

country_code.description: ISO country code of the issuing country

country_name.description: Full name of the issuing country

amount.description: Transaction amount in naira (for NGN) or minor currency units

channels.description: Payment channels to enable for this transaction

redirect_url.description: URL to redirect customer after payment completion

reference.description: Unique transaction reference (optional - auto-generated if not provided)

checkout_url.description: URL to redirect customer for payment

amount.description: Transaction amount in smallest currency unit

gateway_response.description: Response message from the payment gateway

paid_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when payment was completed (null if not paid)

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when transaction was created

fees.description: Transaction fees charged in smallest currency unit

bin.description: First 6 digits of the card number

last4.description: Last 4 digits of the card number

country_code.description: Country code of the issuing bank

reusable.description: Whether the authorization can be reused for future payments

metadata.description: Custom metadata attached to the transaction

bank_code.description: Unique bank code used for transfers

is_active.description: Whether the bank is currently active for transfers

bank_code.description: Bank code for the destination bank

amount.description: Amount to transfer in the smallest currency unit

batch_reference.description: Unique reference for the bulk batch

wallet_id.description: The unique ID of the wallet

balance.description: The current balance in smallest currency unit
